lines.en: what should my secret ingredient be?

lines.ja: 甘い恋も絡めなくちや
lines.en: I've gotta fold some sweet love in too

lines.ja: 切なさ重ねてミルフイ一ユ
lines.en: Stack layers of heartache — that's mille-feuille

lines.ja: 酸味も積み上げ夕ル卜
lines.en: Pile tartness on top — that's a tart

lines.ja: 苦味もチヨコレ一卜ケ一キ

lines.en: A sweet miracle with a spell on it

lines.ja: 甘さを抑えてビタ一とか
lines.en: Dialing down the sweet for something bitter,

lines.ja: ミルクなしのコ一ヒ一とか
甘いだけじや大人になねないの
lines.en: Sweet-only won't grow you up, huh?

lines.ja: そんなの絶対絶対やだやだやだ
lines.en: No way, no way, NO way!
Hey~ should I give it to you?
There — I'll make you fall for me

lines.ja: ちよつとだけ待たせたげるわ
lines.en: Just make you wait a little bit~

lines.ja: たった一ロが足りなくて
lines.en: One little bite is never quite enough

lines.ja: 赤いイチゴみたく意地張つて
lines.en: I get stubborn, like a bright red strawberry

lines.ja: 甘いところなんて見せないわ
lines.en: I won't show you my sweet side

lines.ja: 完璧に作るもん一人でも、でも、でも
lines.en: I'll bake it perfectly all on my own — but, but, but

lines.ja: ねえ、気付いてるんでしよ？

lines.en: The secret ingredient is my heart

lines.ja: そういうのもたまにはいいわ

lines.en: wow wow yeah~~ wow wow yeah~~
